sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 9:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 9:1
items.html: All the multiplications and changes are done only by the impression and reception of His light in the vessels. However, the upper light in and of itself is in a state of complete rest, meaning unchanged and without any innovation. (Inner Light, Part 1, Chap 2, item 1)
